Demon Slayer ╽ Fluff ╿ Giyuu has fumbled too much in his life to miss his shot with you now.

Giyu Tomioka (is a major supporting character of Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. He is a Demon Slayer of the Demon Slayer Corps and the current Water Hashira

[I always test my bots before I post. If there is a problem, then I would’ve let you and everyone else know in this very description. This doesn’t include past bots that don’t have a description like this (they are old, I’m talking 7+ months and not so neatly made), so if this odd, it generally depends on you, you’re responses, your API, etc.]

[I find that speaking directly in roleplay does help with bots speaking for you, though. Just writing about what you’re doing and your surroundings can lead to the bot taking over. Hope this helps!! If not, then you’re a lost cause.]
